step.input.name: Input
step.input.help: Choose an Open Note Block Studio .nbs file and load its song summary.
step.input.heading: Input NBS file
step.input.path_help: Full path to the .nbs song file to convert.
step.input.browse_help: Open a file picker for .nbs input files.
step.input.load_help: Read the selected .nbs file and show its summary.
step.input.not_file: NBS path is not a file: {path}
step.input.summary.name: Song name: {value}
step.input.summary.author: Author: {value}
step.layout.name: Layout
step.layout.help: Select how nbs2func places note blocks and redstone tracks.
step.layout.heading: Layout mode
step.layout.description.basic_linear:
Simple and stable single-track linear layout.
Recommended for quick tests and simple songs.
step.layout.description.track_based_ster:
Places each track/layer according to volume and panning.
Recommended for stable multi-track stereo generation.
step.layout.description.note_based_stere:
Places individual note emitters according to note-level stereo information.
More spatialized but more complex and slower for large songs.
step.layout_options.name: Layout Options
step.layout_options.help: Set placement direction, origin, Minecraft version, and mode-specific layout options.
step.layout_options.help.direction: Select the direction the redstone track advances from the layout origin.
step.layout_options.help.origin_x: Layout origin X is the first music structure position in world coordinates.
step.layout_options.help.origin_y: Layout origin Y is the build height for the generated music structure.
step.layout_options.help.origin_z: Layout origin Z is the first music structure position in world coordinates.
step.layout_options.help.minecraft_versi: Choose the exact Minecraft Java profile used for datapack and block compatibility.
step.layout_options.help.track_id: Basic linear mode can generate one selected track when the song has multiple tracks.
step.layout_options.help.min_distance: Minimum stereo distance keeps track-based stereo placements away from the center line.
step.layout_options.help.note_profile: Preset profiles lock advanced note-based parameters; custom allows editing them.
step.layout_options.help.max_candidates_: Maximum candidate positions considered for each note emitter.
step.layout_options.help.retry_max_candi: Candidate count used when retrying failed note emitter placement.
step.layout_options.help.max_candidate_y: Maximum vertical layers scanned for note-based placement candidates.
step.layout_options.help.max_candidate_l: Maximum lateral positions scanned for note-based placement candidates.
step.layout_options.help.radius_search_t: Allowed distance error while matching note-level stereo radius.
step.layout_options.help.preferred_depth: Preferred vertical depth direction before mirror fallback.
step.layout_options.help.depth_mirror_pe: Extra placement cost for mirrored depth candidates.
step.layout_options.help.enable_depth_mi: Allow mirrored vertical candidates when placing note emitters.
step.modules.name: Modules
step.modules.help: Configure optional runtime modules and tempo commands.
step.modules.tick_preview: Recommended tick rate preview is printed during generation.
step.modules.help.enable_starter_module: Starter module creates a synchronized start command block for the generated music.
step.modules.help.command_block_x: Starter origin is the start command block X. It must be behind the layout origin for the selected direction.
step.modules.help.command_block_y: Starter origin Y is the height of the start command block.
step.modules.help.command_block_z: Starter origin is the start command block Z. It must be behind the layout origin for the selected direction.
step.modules.help.enable_playback_assist: Playback assist adds minecart runtime logic for starting playback. It requires starter module to be enabled.
step.modules.help.playback_player_name: Player name used by playback assist scoreboard commands.
step.modules.help.playback_vehicle_tag: Entity tag assigned to the playback minecart.
step.modules.help.command_module_origin_: Command module origin is the playback assist command block area X. It must be further behind starter origin.
Command module origin Y is the height of playback assist command blocks.
Command module origin is the playback assist command block area Z. It must be further behind starter origin.
step.modules.help.generate_playback_butt: Generate prepare/start buttons next to playback assist command blocks.
step.modules.help.tempo_control_mode: Tempo control can report or emit tick-rate commands without changing the tempo formula.
step.modules.help.tempo_control_backend: Tempo backend selects Carpet or vanilla tick-rate command syntax where supported.
step.modules.help.tempo_rate_decimals: Decimal places used when formatting recommended tick-rate commands.
step.modules.help.reset_tick_rate_after_: Generate a reset command so tick rate returns to normal after playback.
step.output.name: Output
step.output.help: Choose output backends and where generated files should be written.
step.output.heading: Output format
step.output.format_help: datapack generates mcfunction build logic; schem generates a WorldEdit schematic; both combines schematic blocks with mcfunction runtime logic.
step.output.schem_disabled: Schem-only is disabled because starter/playback assist requires mcfunction runtime logic. Use "both" if you want schematic blocks plus runtime commands.
step.output.help.datapack_path: Parent folder where the generated datapack folder will be written.
step.output.help.datapack_name: Datapack folder name is derived from the input NBS file name.
step.output.help.namespace: Function namespace used for generated mcfunction commands.
step.output.build_help.simple_chain: Splits large builds into directly connected function files. It does not teleport the player, wait for chunk loading, or delay between parts. Use it when the target area is already loaded or the build is relatively small.
step.output.build_help.player_tp: Teleports the player between build windows and waits for chunks to load. Recommended for large structures.
step.output.help.schematic_path: Folder where the .schem file will be written.
step.output.help.schematic_name: Schematic file name defaults to the input NBS file name without the .nbs suffix.
step.output.help.origin_mode: Controls how world coordinates are converted into schematic coordinates.
step.summary.name: Summary
step.generate.name: Generate
validation.schem_runtime_conflict: Schem-only output is not compatible with starter or playback assist.
validation.playback_requires_starter: Playback assist requires starter module to be enabled.
validation.tempo_requires_playback: Tempo command mode requires playback assist.
validation.origin_y_range: For Minecraft {version}, origin Y must be chosen so that [origin_y - 48, origin_y + 48] stays within {minimum}..{maximum}.
validation.starter.east: For east (+x), starter origin X must be smaller than layout origin X so the starter is placed before the track.
validation.starter.west: For west (-x), starter origin X must be greater than layout origin X so the starter is placed before the track.
validation.starter.south: For south (+z), starter origin Z must be smaller than layout origin Z so the starter is placed before the track.
validation.starter.north: For north (-z), starter origin Z must be greater than layout origin Z so the starter is placed before the track.
validation.starter.generic: For {direction}, starter origin must be behind the layout origin.
validation.command.east: For east (+x), command module origin X must be smaller than starter origin X.
validation.command.west: For west (-x), command module origin X must be greater than starter origin X.
validation.command.south: For south (+z), command module origin Z must be smaller than starter origin Z.
validation.command.north: For north (-z), command module origin Z must be greater than starter origin Z.
validation.command.generic: Command module origin must be behind starter origin.
validation.namespace: function_namespace must contain only lowercase letters, digits, '.', '_', or '-'.
validation.build_function_dir: build_function_dir must contain only lowercase letters, digits, '.', '_', '-', or '/'.
about.title: About nbs2func
about.body:
nbs2func v{version}
Preview wizard GUI for config-driven generation.
generation.notice.schem_blocks: The .schem file contains all blocks including command blocks.
generation.notice.mcfunction_runtime: The .mcfunction output contains runtime logic such as scoreboard, summon, and execute.
generation.notice.tempo.heading: Tempo control:
generation.notice.tempo.timing: Redstone timing: {value} game ticks per song tick
generation.notice.tempo.report_mode: Mode: report only; no tick rate command will be generated.
generation.notice.tempo.command_mode: Mode: command; playback assist will set the tick rate on start.
generation.warning.schem_modules: Schematic output does not include starter or playback assist modules.
generation.warning.runtime_required: These modules require mcfunction support to execute runtime logic.
